query:
CREATE TABLE `products` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`price` int NOT NULL,
	`image` text NOT NULL,
	`link` text NOT NULL,
	`rating` int,
	`reviews` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`badge` varchar(100),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `products_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3NSmzhQk57F6Qqm.root --database eG7tCpxgJHL2beNG2g3VYE --execute CREATE TABLE `products` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`price` int NOT NULL,
	`image` text NOT NULL,
	`link` text NOT NULL,
	`rating` int,
	`reviews` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`badge` varchar(100),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `products_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
